---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: "OOH Session #131...<br>[...let's make a website!!]{.bangers2 .Bigger}{{< iconify game-icons:web-spit style='color:#ffffff;' >}}"
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: https://disney.images.edge.bamgrid.com/ripcut-delivery/v2/variant/disney/544a09f2-38ae-47b4-a295-f7eeaf669023/compose?format=webp&width=2560 
  data-background-opacity: ".9"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://www.freeiconspng.com/thumbs/spider-web-png/white-spider-web-png-9.png #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
+ Recap session #130
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[...let's make a website!!]{.bangers2 .biggeR}{{< iconify game-icons:web-spit style="color:#ffffff;" >}}](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/)
+ Shared problem-solving

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 170px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/5_19_26">
  <img src="/img/title130.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#130: 

![](https://pngimg.com/uploads/sticky_note/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="100"}

![](https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/e4638f60-ecd7-4228-b667-e7628252709e/dhq1lm1-a29e1617-2f53-4409-9dd8-39f0a86a6c30.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RGZa4bbfqyqQSXzNujPQzmp24K6DVgfBg4V1U0N5T3Y){.absolute top="285" right="115" height="200"}

## [[{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}}]{.bigger} [Shortcodes!!]{.syncopate}](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/shortcodes.html)

::: {.panel-tabset}

+ Structure is `{{< name arg1 arg2 key=value >}}`  
+ entire `{{{< ... >}}}` is referred to as a "[shortcode](https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-shortcodes)"

### whazzat{{< iconify noto-v1:exclamation-question-mark >}} 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="5%"}

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

<br>

`{{{< ... >}}}` structured [markdown]{.underline} shortcuts for (potentially more complicated) content

:::

:::

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZ3pscW1sbWZqemc5a3BlNG9mcHIwMWs0NWY2dGZuMWR1ZjZzY24wdSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/IHnROpQICe4kE/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-40" bottom="50" height="400"}

### pre--built 

::: {.smaller}
::: {.list-table tbl-colwidths="[40,35,25]"}

- - [shortcode]{.underline}:
  - [description]{.underline}:
  - [rendered]{.underline}:

- - `{{{< meta title >}}}`
  - title as specified in YAML
  
  - {{< meta title >}} 
  
- - `{{{< version >}}}`
  - Quarto version
  
  - {{< version >}} 
  
- - `{{{< placeholder >}}}`
  - placeholder image
  
  - {{< placeholder 200 60 >}} 
  
:::
:::
### build--your--own {{< iconify mdi:crane style="color:#c4c21d;" >}}

At terminal, type [`quarto create extension shortcode`](https://quarto.org/docs/extensions/shortcodes.html#quick-start)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="5%"}

::: 

::: {.column width="45%"}

+ do this [*within a project directory*]{.underline}
+ capability is specified within `name.lua` file {{< iconify line-md:upload-loop rotate=45 >}}

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

Default .lua function: 

```{r}
return {
  ['shorty'] = function(args, kwargs, meta) 
    return pandoc.Str("Hello from Shorty!")
  end
}
```
:::

:::

:::

![](https://comicvine.gamespot.com/a/uploads/original/1/15776/8674793-rocky.png){.absolute left="-150" bottom="140" height="200" .mirror}

![](https://preview.redd.it/who-is-everyones-favorite-looney-tune-and-why-v0-tk5m5e2zfzfe1.jpeg?width=759&format=pjpg&auto=webp&s=eda70c60e2367b1b9aca8461e672f2637ad24930){.absolute right="-70" top="-5" height="250"}

# Today...

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYnNkYjNvN3Vlc2U2YnJvYTI4NHdxbm96YTN5NXh4ZndtamVuamhuaiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/10fFT7qzHrN0D6/giphy.gif)

## [[...let's make a website!!]{.bangers2 .biggeR}{{< iconify game-icons:web-spit style="color:#ffffff;" >}}](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/)

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdmYzaDY0YWxxcnV4MTZnY3F3NDUwMnhyeGNwNHEycndwMjZnbWt2YiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Eb63LPCiBNwRy/giphy.gif){.absolute left="-10" height="500"}

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcGg5MXcxanVveWt3a2R1dWR3Z3hndWo1bmN5MHhmMHAwODJvdGJ6ayZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/B9O4oVqGjOBFu/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-100" bottom="170"}


## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} & {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

Quarto version `r quarto::quarto_version()`  

:::

:::
